# CWE-335 safe: Incorrect Usage of Seeds in Pseudo-Random Number Generator (PRNG) (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-335-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/binary"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

func AssignQueueTicket(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	var n uint32
	if err := binary.Read(rand.Reader, binary.BigEndian, &n); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	ticket := strconv.FormatUint(uint64(n%10000), 10)
	w.Header().Set("X-Ticket", ticket)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
